## Summary

Describe the focused change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change has a focused scope.
- [ ] Reuse of existing components, tokens, utilities, or patterns was considered.
- [ ] Package boundaries are correct.
- [ ] No unnecessary dependency was added.
- [ ] Public API impact was reviewed.
- [ ] CSS token and prefix ownership is respected.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where relevant.
- [ ] Accessibility behavior was reviewed.
- [ ] Light and dark themes were reviewed where relevant.
- [ ] Density and responsive behavior were reviewed where relevant.
- [ ] Documentation and playground examples were updated where relevant.
- [ ] Changelog or migration notes were updated when applicable.
- [ ] `npm run lint --if-present` passed.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passed.
- [ ] `npm run test` passed.
- [ ] `npm run build` passed.
- [ ] No credentials, `.env` files, `node_modules`, logs, archives, or generated output were committed.

## Notes

List known limitations, follow-up tasks, or intentional omissions.
